source_excel.name: 磁力颗粒编号.xlsx
source_excel.role: formal SKU cell IDs; product names and sizes where populated

mapping_policy: Use Excel cell IDs; never map embedded images by drawing order.
render_policy: Procedurally redrawn square faces with factory-calibrated multiscale print grain; factory overview crops are contact-sheet references and never become Blender materials.
